name: Rapalogs track outlook
summary: Illustrative track-level outlook for nutrient-sensing interventions built around rapalogs.
main_evidence_gaps: Limited durable functional evidence in older adults
Dose and tolerability uncertainty for aging-focused use
strongest_current_evidence: Human studies exist rather than purely preclinical work
Mechanistic rationale is strong and widely studied
interpretation_note: This track appears scientifically active and plausible, but public progress should remain constrained until replicated functional benefit is clearer.
